case_title: WINE GEMS DISTRIBUTION LLC VS. L'MIDA LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2024 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-17-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WINE GEMS DISTRIBUTION LLC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTOPHE ROLLAND, MANAGING PARTNER. DEFENDANT L'MIDA LLC REPRESENTED BY LEONARDO CIDRAD DE ARAUJO, OWNER/MANAGER. UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DAWN PAYNE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REPRESENTED BY WALID MEFTEH, MANAGER/OWNER. FILED BY DEFENDANT L'MIDA LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: LAURA KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCE BY CHRISTOPHE ROLLAND ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF WINE GEMS DISTRIBUTION LLC. DEFENDANT L'MIDA LLC NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINE GEMS DISTRIBUTION LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT L'MIDA LLC $4,580.40 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 INTEREST, $431.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,162.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,426.00 FILED BY WINE GEMS DISTRIBUTION LLC AS TO DEFENDANT L'MIDA LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
